top_signals.title: Trump administration's AI crackdown opens door for China to close gap
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration's crackdown on Anthropic's leading artificial intelligence models is looking like a gift to China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The great wealth transfer rattling Wall Street
top_signals.summary: Tens of trillions of dollars are moving between generations — and younger heirs feel little loyalty to traditional advisers

top_signals.title: America’s stillborn 250th birthday
top_signals.summary: An event that was meant to celebrate an exceptional nation has been cornered by one man

top_signals.title: FDA lets Philip Morris market Zyn nicotine pouches as less harmful than cigarettes
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration has expanded access to nicotine products despite concerns from public health critics about youth use and addiction.
